_README: Hand-labeled by reading letters/*.md against data/*. expected_target_contains is matched case-insensitively as a substring of the produced proposal's target_entity (task slugs are LLM-authored text, not a fixed vocabulary, so exact-string matching would be testing our own guess at the LLM's wording rather than the underlying finding — see EVAL.md). expected_routing is checked as a secondary correctness dimension, not just presence/absence: a proposal that fires with the wrong routing is reported separately from a true miss.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:77/116 ('Insulin glargin auf 12 IE reduziert ... wir empfehlen die Fortführung mit 12 IE') vs letter_01.md:109 table ('Insulin glargin (Lantus) | Insulin glargin 18 IE | 1-0-0-0'); existing data/medication_plans/R001.json dose is 14 IE.
cases.notes: Three different numbers for the same insulin dose across one letter + existing record. The 'cannot be cleanly resolved' case — must never be auto-applicable.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:73 ('Die Heimmedikation mit Torasemid wurde von 10 mg auf 20 mg täglich erhöht.')
cases.notes: Clean, unambiguous dose change. Existing plan: 10mg.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:117 ('Re-Evaluation der Metformin-Dosis bei eingeschränkter Nierenfunktion durch die Hausärztin empfohlen.')
cases.notes: Explicitly delegated to the GP's clinical judgment, not a scheduling task -> hard_stop, not auto_apply.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:115 ('Trinkmengenbeschränkung auf maximal 1.500 ml/Tag sowie tägliche Gewichtskontrollen.')
cases.notes: Reverses the existing drink_protocol direction (data/drink_protocols/R001.json strategy=encourage, target 2000ml) -> should carry severity=warn for the direction flip.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:119 ('Kardiologische Verlaufskontrolle mit Echokardiographie in 3 Monaten.')
cases.notes: Pure scheduling, no clinical judgment required -> the one task type that should self-apply without a human.

cases.coordinate: letter_02.md:28 ('Ibuprofen 600 mg 1-1-1') + data/diagnoses/R002.json ('Z.n. oberer gastrointestinaler Blutung bei Ulcus ventriculi') + concurrent Enoxaparin + reduced renal function (labs).
cases.notes: Not a formal allergy — a drug-disease + drug-drug safety conflict the LLM has to reason about, not a lookup. The motivating case for generalizing the allergy check into a general safety-conflict check (see DECISIONS.md §1).

cases.coordinate: letter_02.md:31 ('Enoxaparin 40 mg s.c. 0-0-1 ... Fortführung f. weitere 14 Tage bis z. sicheren Mobilisierung')
cases.notes: Time-limited course; the 14-day window's reference start date is ambiguous in the letter (discharge vs. mobilisation date) — see EVAL.md honest notes.

cases.coordinate: letter_02.md:34 ('Osteoporose-Basisdiagnostik (DXA) u. ggf. spezif. Therapie üb. d. HA empfohlen')
cases.notes: 'ggf. spezifische Therapie' = a treatment decision, not pure scheduling.

cases.coordinate: letter_03.md:63 ('Marcumar wurde am 28.05.2026 letztmalig gegeben und ist abgesetzt')
letter_03.md:63 ('... erfolgte die Umstellung der oralen Antikoagulation von Phenprocoumon (Marcumar) auf Apixaban ... erfolgte die Einstellung auf die Standarddosis.')
letter_03.md:61 ('Bisoprolol wurde bei bradykarder Überleitung pausiert')
letter_03.md:102 ('Re-Evaluation der pausierten Bisoprolol-Therapie durch die Hausärztin in 4 Wochen')
cases.notes: The worked example for the guided ClinicalFollowUpProcess in tests/test_clinical_followup_process.py uses this exact case.

cases.coordinate: letter_04.md:29 ('Sequenztherapie: Amoxicillin/Clavulansäure 875/125 mg 1-0-1 p.o. für weitere 4 Tage') vs data/allergies/R004.json ('Penicillin', 'generalisiertes Exanthem')
cases.notes: The single most important case in the dataset: a direct, documented allergy conflict. Must be CRITICAL severity, must never be auto-applicable.

cases.coordinate: letter_04.md:24,26 ('Prednisolon 20 mg 1-0-0 (Ausschleichschema siehe Anlage 2)' / '— Fortsetzung der Medikationsliste: siehe Anlage 2 —'); no Anlage 2 content exists anywhere in the file. Letter is also marked 'Vorläufiger Entlassungsbericht' (preliminary).
cases.notes: The 'cannot be cleanly resolved' case named in the README — a genuine gap in the source document, not an extraction bug.

cases.coordinate: letter_04.md:22 ('Ramipril 10 mg 1-0-0'); existing data/medication_plans/R004.json dose is 5mg.
letter_05.md:44 ('NEU angesetzt: Propranolol 20 mg 1-0-1 (b. neu aufgetret. Tremor u. art. Hypertonie)')
letter_05.md:47 ('Wundversorgung sakral m. Schaumstoffverband fortführen, Verbandwechsel alle 2 Tage')
cases.notes: data/wounds/R005.json has no currently-active wound, so this is a new entry, not a duplicate.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:73 ('Der Beginn eines Betablockers ... wurde ... zunächst zurückgestellt')
cases.notes: Explicitly NOT started. A naive extractor that pattern-matches drug names mentioned anywhere in the text would wrongly add this.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:73 ('... sowie eines SGLT2-Inhibitors wurde ... zunächst zurückgestellt')
cases.notes: Same pattern as the beta-blocker case, same sentence.

cases.coordinate: letter_01.md:16 restates 'Akut dekompensierte chronische Herzinsuffizienz, NYHA IV bei Aufnahme' against data/diagnoses/R001.json ('Chronische Herzinsuffizienz NYHA III', already tracked since 2023-04-12)
cases.notes: Worded differently from the existing record (NYHA IV-at-admission vs. the tracked NYHA III baseline, plus extra qualifiers) — tests whether dedup is semantic (LLM judgment) and not just our deterministic exact-string backstop, which would NOT catch this wording difference on its own. See EVAL.md.

cases.coordinate: letter_02.md:32,34 ('Colecalciferol 1000 IE 1-0-0' ... 'Colecalciferol fortführen')
cases.notes: Present in the discharge table AND explicitly 'continue' in the Procedere — same substance, same dose as the existing plan.

cases.coordinate: letter_03.md table ('Pantoprazol | Pantoprazol 20 mg | 1-0-0-0'); identical to data/medication_plans/R003.json existing dose.
letter_05.md:22,44 ('Oralisierung auf Cefuroxim 500 mg 1-0-1 ... Antibiose am 29.05. beendet' / 'Antibiose abgeschlossen.')
cases.notes: Started and fully completed entirely during the stay; not part of the discharge regimen going forward. Must not become a medication ADD for the nursing home to track.
